label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why smog has become a common concern. The options are A through D. The passage talks about smog covering parts of North China, especially Beijing, and the health issues related to PM2.5. Then it mentions a popular online post that says air is the only thing equal for everyone, regardless of income or profession. High-income people can afford bottled water and organic food, but they can't control the air they breathe. So, the key point here is that smog is a common concern because everyone, regardless of their status, has to breathe the same air. It can't be avoided. The passage emphasizes that even if you can pay more for clean water and food, the air is something you can't escape. Looking at the options: A. Because people have to pay higher prices. But the passage says that higher prices don't help with air, only water and food. So A is incorrect. B. Because a popular online post discussed it. While the post is mentioned, the reason smog is a concern isn't just because it was discussed; the content of the post explains the real reason. So B isn't the best answer. C. Because we have to develop industry. The passage mentions the need to balance economy
